== Notes for [[Item:Q108340|Q108340]] ==

Progenitor of ''Fatimid Imamate'' ('''Caliphate''') of '''Egypt'''.

'''10th Shia Isma'ili Imaam'''

* Date of Ascension: 225 AH (839/ 840 AD)
* Period of Imamate: 43 Years
* Wilaadat (Birth): 219 AH (834 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 268 AH (881 AD)

Souce: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rabi_Abdullah

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:5465224788500064756

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
